creator: jashank.jeremy@optusnet.com.au
text:
ports/editors/openoffice.org-3-devel
	1. will not compile properly in -DWITH_DEBUG mode
	2. will not install correctly because some build paths have
           changed.

Fix: 

1. is a known issue upstream (and hasn't been patched since it
	   was noted in February of this year); a local patch will fix
	   it:  http://www.openoffice.org/issues/show_bug.cgi?id=108224
	2. is a matter of removing references to "unxfbsd?.pro" and
	   replacing them with "unxfbsd?".
How-To-Repeat: 	1. build ports/editors/openoffice.org-3-devel as of Makefile
	   1.490 with -DWITH_DEBUG specified
	2. attempt to install ports/editors/openoffice.org-3-devel as
	   of Makefile 1.490
